item.title: LEGO Speed Champions 2023 McLaren Formula 1 Race Car Toy for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls who Love Independent Play Buildable Vehicle Model Set Kids Bedroom Decoration Birthday Gift 76919
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Speed Champions 2023 McLaren Formula 1 Race Car Toy for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls who Love Independent Play Buildable Vehicle Model Set Kids Bedroom Decoration Birthday Gift 76919 at the following link: ℹ️: Bigger racing adventures – Look out for more LEGO Speed Champions model cars with authentic details, sets sold separately McLaren car toy for kids – LEGO Speed Champions McLaren 2023 Formula 1 Race Car toy for 9+ year old boys, girls and F1 fans Car gifts – This building toy provides a fun build-and-play experience and is a fun gift for 9+-year-old boys, girls or adult car-model collectors LEGO vehicle display model – After kids have taken the F1 toy for a drive around the track, it looks great on display as a kids bedroom decoration 1 minifigure – The McLaren F1 model car includes a LEGO race driver minifigure with a helmet, wig and a wrench for kids to place behind the wheel Authentic details – The model features the distinctive black-and-papaya livery, team-sponsor logos, wheels with Pirelli print and papaya safety halo 🛒 Check the deal!
